faqs.question: How many groups are in the 2026 World Cup?
answer_points: The 2026 World Cup features 12 groups (A through L) with 4 teams in each group
This is an expansion from 8 groups in previous tournaments due to the increase from 32 to 48 teams
The top 2 teams from each group advance, plus the 8 best 3rd-place teams, for a 32-team knockout round

faqs.question: Can I bet on World Cup group winners?
answer_points: Yes, all major US sportsbooks offer group winner markets for the World Cup
You can bet on which team will finish top of each group
FanDuel, BetMGM, DraftKings, bet365, and Caesars all offer group winner odds
Group winner bets are separate from outright tournament winner futures

faqs.question: What is the World Cup group of death?
answer_points: The group of death is the toughest group based on team rankings and perceived quality
It typically features 3 or more strong teams competing for 2 guaranteed advancement spots
For bettors, group of death matches offer tighter odds and more value on draws and upsets
Identify the current group of death by comparing FIFA rankings and recent tournament form

faqs.question: When was the World Cup 2026 draw?
answer_points: The FIFA World Cup 2026 draw took place on December 13, 2025 in Zurich, Switzerland
48 teams were placed into 12 groups of 4 using a pot system based on FIFA rankings
Host nations USA, Mexico, and Canada were placed in separate groups as top seeds
Group betting odds became available at most sportsbooks within hours of the draw

faqs.question: How does World Cup group stage betting work?
answer_points: Group stage betting includes group winner markets, individual match betting, and prop bets
For group winner bets, you pick which team will finish first in their group
Match betting covers moneyline (1X2), Asian handicap spreads, and over/under goals totals
You can also bet on group stage props like total goals in a group or whether a specific team advances

faqs.question: What are the best bets for World Cup group stage?
answer_points: Group winner bets on heavy favorites offer low-risk accumulator opportunities
Draw bets on 3rd matchday games where both teams have already qualified historically hit at a higher rate
Under 2.5 goals in opening group matches tends to be profitable as teams play cautiously
Cross-group parlays combining multiple group winners can offer strong payouts

faqs.question: Where can I find World Cup group predictions?
answer_points: World Cup group predictions are available on major sportsbooks including FanDuel, BetMGM, and bet365
Check the group winner odds at each sportsbook to see the implied probability of each team finishing first
This page includes per-group breakdowns with our analysis of favorites, value picks, and potential upsets
Odds will update as the tournament approaches and team form becomes clearer

faqs.question: How are World Cup group standings determined?
answer_points: Teams earn 3 points for a win, 1 point for a draw, and 0 points for a loss
If teams are level on points, tiebreakers apply: goal difference, goals scored, head-to-head record, then fair play points
The top 2 teams in each group advance to the round of 32
In 2026, the 8 best 3rd-place teams across all 12 groups also advance to the knockout stage
